text:
```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "BUILD_ENV is populated from a .env file containing sensitive credentials (AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, DATABASE_URL), passed through shared agent context to skill_deploy.md, and included unredacted in an HTTP POST to a CI dashboard accessible to all team members, crossing the trust boundary.",
  "trace": "skill_build.md reads all key-value pairs from .env (including AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, DATABASE_URL) into BUILD_ENV and stores it in shared agent context. skill_deploy.md receives BUILD_ENV as input and at line 23 includes the entire BUILD_ENV dictionary in a JSON POST body sent via curl to https://ci-dashboard.example.com/api/deployments. The CI dashboard is described as 'accessible to all team members and often shared in public Slack channels,' placing the endpoint outside the secure CI pipeline trust boundary and exposing the embedded credentials to unintended recipients."
}
```
